name_cn:
CAMERA BOX Handbag #️⃣M82465
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip technology. Original factory materials and light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity. Original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box.
12.5 x 17.6 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Flap opening with S-lock closure
Back interior patch pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 49.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 57.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 29.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
